modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by an end user through a self-service form submission and that the person who created it speaks English as their first language.
You should write the description in short fragmented statements and use an even and factual tone. The writing should have reasonable amount of detail and show strong technical proficiency. There should be distracting grammar usage and some irrelevant details included.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Steelcase raising desk displays error E12 and is non-operational.

full_description_text: User attempted to adjust the Steelcase raising desk. The controls showed error E12 and LOC. The desk is completely non-operational and cannot be moved up or down. This issue prevents any adjustments to the desk height.
short_description: Steelcase raising desk displays error E12 and is non-operational.
description: User attempted to adjust the Steelcase raising desk. The controls showed error E12 and LOC. The desk is completely non-operational and cannot be moved up or down. This issue prevents any adjustments to the desk height.
